---
title: "Week 3"
subtitle: "Modeling + Causality I"
editor: visual
---

## Prepare

📖 Read [CH.5 in ModernDive](https://moderndive.com/v2/regression.html)

📖 Read [Introduction in Causal Inference: The Mixtape](https://mixtape.scunning.com/)^[1](https://quantpol.juanftellez.com/content/07-content.html#fn1)^

## Lectures

🖥️ [Lecture 7 - Modeling I](not-available-lec.html)

🖥️ [Lecture 8 - Modeling II](not-available-lec.html)

🖥️ [Lecture 9 - Causality I](not-avaliable-lec.html)

## Participation

📋

## Lab

⌨️ [Lab 3 - Modeling I + II](not-available.html)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
